docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEE, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
